canonical_yaml:
claim: falsify CLI startup stays under 500ms median over 5 invocations
experiment:
  command: python3 claims/self/cli_startup/metric.py
  dataset: .
  metric_fn: claims.self.cli_startup.metric:cli_startup_ms
falsification:
  failure_criteria:
  - direction: below
    metric: startup_ms
    threshold: 500
  minimum_sample_size: 5
  stopping_rule: fixed-n 5 invocations per run
